name: Tarten Riwbob (Rhubarb Tart)
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a plate or shallow tin with half the pastry.
2. Fill with fruit, cover with sugar and add a little water.
3. Cover with the rest of the pastry.
4. Bake for 45 minutes at Gas Mark 6 (400F).
5. Reduce heat to Gas Mark 4 (350F) and bake for an additional 20 minutes.
All kinds of plate tarts with pastry top and bottom are popular in Wales. Apples, plums, gooseberries, or mixtures of any kinds of fruits in season can be used.
